item.title: 独立推理 / Token 运营商
item.summary: 通过推理调度、模型覆盖和 Token 运营提供独立模型服务的范式。

updates.event: 每年投放上亿元算力券、模型券和数据券

evidence.source_quote: 每年投放上亿元算力券、模型券和数据券

updates.event: Beijing's policy encourages developing the Token economy by promoting general processors for agent system calls, dedicated low-latency high-throughput inference chips, and inference architecture optimizations including heterogeneous collaboration, storage-compute collaboration, and intelligent scheduling to reduce inference cost and improve token efficiency.

evidence.source_quote: 鼓励发展 Token 经济。推动创新主体研发适配智能体系统调用、复杂任务调度与高频决策的通用处理器，开发低延迟、高吞吐专用推理芯片。推动创新主体开展推理架构等关键技术攻关，通过异构协同、存算协同以及智能调度等降低推理成本，加快推理缓存复用、智能任务路由等应用层效率优化，全链路优化提高 Token 效率

updates.event: 单token价格相比去年已降到约八分之一到十分之一

evidence.source_quote: 单 token 价格相比去年已降到约八分之一到十分之一

facts.statement: 每年投放上亿元算力券、模型券和数据券

Beijing's policy encourages developing the Token economy by promoting general processors for agent system calls, dedicated low-latency high-throughput inference chips, and inference architecture optimizations including heterogeneous collaboration, storage-compute collaboration, and intelligent scheduling to reduce inference cost and improve token efficiency.
facts.value: encourages token economy via agent-optimized processors, low-latency inference chips, and full-stack token efficiency optimization

facts.statement: 单token价格相比去年已降到约八分之一到十分之一

item.html:
